title: nicotiana floribunda
intro: Nicotiana floribunda, also known as the large-flowered tobacco tree or many-flowered tobacco, is a flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nicotiana floribunda include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe and calm the body and mind.
